description: A product manager or product-minded builder who needs to extract, articulate, and maintain product context using the Discovery Tree framework.

activities.title: Set Up a Product Line
activities.goal: Create the top-level container that holds all discovery work for one product.

stories.action: Create a new product line with a name via the Product Line Selector
Edit the product line title inline on the Overview page
Edit the product line description with markdown formatting and preview
Set the local code path for a product line so AI prompts can reference the codebase location
Change product line status (active, closed, archived) via the status indicator
Delete a product line from the Product Line Selector
See co-worker intro card on first visit to an empty product line
Copy co-worker setup prompt to clipboard and track Coworker Setup Started event
Dismiss the intro card and see persistent co-worker button in the empty state
Re-access co-worker setup prompt via the compact button after dismissing the card

activities.title: Define Personas
activities.goal: Create and manage user/buyer personas for the current product line.

stories.action: Expand the Persona Manager to see all personas for this product line
Hover a persona name to see its markdown-rendered description in a tooltip
Create a new persona with name and markdown description via the slide-over form
Open an existing persona in the slide-over to update its details
Remove a persona with a confirmation prompt

activities.title: Define a Business Outcome
activities.goal: Create the top-level strategic goal for the product line.

stories.action: Navigate to the Overview page from the sidebar
Create a new Business Outcome with title and description
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Configure structured metric tracking with frequency, numeric targets, and date range
Record a metric data point and view progress in the interactive area chart with hover tooltips
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children
Add a child Product Outcome from the children section

activities.title: Define a Product Outcome
activities.goal: Break a business outcome into measurable product-level results.

stories.action: Open the parent Business Outcome via the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Create a new Product Outcome with title and description
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Configure structured metric tracking with frequency, numeric targets, and date range
Record a metric data point and view progress in the interactive area chart with hover tooltips
View solution completion markers on the metric chart showing when child solutions were marked done
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children
Assign a primary persona via the Persona Picker
Add or remove secondary personas via the multi-select picker
Switch to the Signals tab on a Product Outcome to view input tracking
Add a signal inline with name, frequency, and format
Record a data point on a signal with the inline record form
Pause or resume a signal to temporarily stop tracking without deleting it
Add a child Opportunity from the children section

activities.title: Map Opportunities
activities.goal: Identify user needs and pain points that a product outcome could address.

stories.action: Open the parent Product Outcome via the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Create a new Opportunity with title and description
Assign a primary persona to the opportunity (primary only — secondary personas are available only on Product Outcomes)
Rate the opportunity using Impact, Confidence, and Ease sliders (1–10 each) to compute an ICE score
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children
Copy an opportunity writing prompt to capture or refine the opportunity via the AI skill
Add a child Solution from the children section

activities.title: Design Solutions
activities.goal: Propose concrete solutions that address an identified opportunity.

stories.action: Open the parent Opportunity via the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Create a new Solution with title and description
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children
Add a child Assumption from the children section

activities.title: Slice the User Journey into Stories
activities.goal: Turn a solution's high-level user journey into a structured set of INVEST-compliant stories that can be reviewed, refined, and handed to the agent.

steps.title: Slice empty user journey to populate the map

stories.action: Copy the slicer prompt from a Solution's empty Stories tab to start populating the story map
Choose custom labels for the iteration slices (Walking Skeleton, Enhancement, GA) during the slicer interview so the story map rows reflect the team's release naming
[system] Slicer skill writes structured Story records into solution.stories[] in store.json (replaces previous MD-file output)

steps.title: Add a single story to a task cell

stories.action: Click the '+' affordance in a task cell to create a new story inline without re-running the full slicer

steps.title: Read the Patton story map for the active persona

stories.action: View activities, tasks, and iteration rows (one Walking Skeleton row, one or more Enhancement rows, one GA row — each with the team's chosen label) as a Patton-style grid with story cards at each task × iteration intersection
Switch between persona-specific backbones via the persona strip when a solution covers multiple personas
Open a story card from the Patton map to see its full details — id, title, iteration kind + label, activity → task crumb, acceptance criteria, and analytics events
Mark a story as done from the story detail slide-over so the Patton map card reflects shipped progress with a green check

steps.title: Hand off a single story to the agent

stories.action: Click 'Plan & Implement story' in the slide-over footer to copy a prompt containing only that story's ID and hand it off to the agent for fine-grained implementation
See muted helper text instead of the button when the open story has no acceptance criteria, so only ready stories can be handed off

steps.title: Add acceptance criteria + analytics events to stories

stories.action: Click the toolbar 'Add acceptance criteria' button to copy the AC writer prompt; the skill writes Gherkin AC and analytics events directly to each story record
[system] AC writer skill writes structured acceptance_criteria + analytics_events into solution.stories[] in store.json (replaces previous MD-file output)
Click 'Refine story' in the slide-over footer to copy a single prompt that fills the story definition and AC for a manually-added story

activities.title: Validate Assumptions
activities.goal: Surface and test the riskiest assumptions behind a solution.

stories.action: Open the parent Solution via the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Create a new Assumption with title and description (auto-generates Impact if True and Evidence blocks)
Assign an assumption type (Desirability, Usability, Feasibility, Viability, or Ethical) via the type picker
View the colored type pill on the entity and on child cards in the parent grid
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children
Create a new Test under the assumption (auto-generates Define Test and Pass/Fail Criteria blocks)
Assign a test type (Prototype Test, One-Question Survey, Data Mining, or Research Spike) via the type picker
View the colored type pill on the entity and on child cards in the parent grid
Edit the entity title inline
Edit the entity description with markdown formatting and preview
Add a content block (accordion, pills, or quote)
Edit or delete an existing content block
Change entity status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Mark entity as dropped, cascading the status to all children

activities.title: Organize & Prioritize
activities.goal: Manage entity statuses and views to focus on what matters most.

stories.action: Change an entity's status (draft, explore, commit, done, archived, dropped) via the Status Picker
Switch between Grid and Kanban views using the view mode toggle

steps.title: Move entities between statuses in Kanban

stories.action: Drag a child card from one Kanban column to another to change its status
Drag cards up or down within a Kanban column to reorder by priority
Reorder root Business Outcome cards within a column on the Overview page
Toggle visibility of archived and dropped items in the Done column
View cards in Grid mode grouped by status priority: commit, explore, draft, done, archived, dropped
Compare ICE score badges on opportunity cards to prioritize across the grid

activities.title: View & Manage the Metric Tree
activities.goal: See how all outcomes and signals relate as a metric hierarchy, and adjust driver/driven relationships.

stories.action: Toggle from Discovery Tree to Metric Tree using the sidebar segmented control
View all Business and Product Outcomes arranged as a recursive driver/driven tree with connector lines
See signal health and latest values as detail rows inside each outcome card
Navigate to an outcome's detail view by clicking its metric card
Zoom in or out on large metric trees using the zoom controls
Change a Product Outcome's driver relationship by picking a new parent in the reparent dropdown, updating the tree immediately

activities.title: Navigate & Review
activities.goal: Move through the discovery tree to review and connect ideas.

stories.action: Navigate to the product line overview by selecting Discovery Tree in the sidebar view toggle
Navigate to any entity by clicking it in the sidebar tree
Jump to any ancestor entity using the breadcrumb trail
Switch to a different product line via the Product Line Selector
Collapse or expand the sidebar to control workspace layout

activities.title: Manage Preferences
activities.goal: Customize how the workspace looks and behaves.

stories.action: Open the account menu to access display preferences
Choose between automatic (time-based) or manual light/dark theme
Accept or decline anonymous analytics consent on first launch via the consent banner

activities.title: Export Context for AI Agent
activities.goal: Generate context-rich prompts from the discovery tree to drive AI-assisted planning and coding.

stories.action: Copy a context anchor for any entity to reference it in an AI agent
Copy a full planning prompt from a Solution entity that includes Opportunity context, Solution details, persona, codebase path, and skill instructions
Copy an AI writing prompt from a Product Outcome to launch the opportunity writer skill for a new opportunity
Copy an AI writing prompt from an existing Opportunity to launch the opportunity writer skill for editing
Copy an AI prompt from an Opportunity to launch the solutions brainstormer skill and generate 5 distinct solution approaches
Copy an AI prompt from the Product Line overview to generate a WIP briefing covering metric health, management signals, and insights per product outcome
Copy a co-worker setup prompt from the Root AI Actions menu to define a product line's Business Outcome, Product Outcome, and Opportunities via the new-product-line-setup skill
